title: The Salt in Our Waters
overview: Rudro, a young sculptor, moves to a remote Bangladeshi beach village after the death of his conservative father. At first he is welcomed by the locals, but after the fishing shoals they rely on start to disappear, Rudro is harassed by the village chairman's men and his progressive ideas are blamed.

trailers.title: NONAJOLER KABBO | Official Trailer. In Theaters - November 26.
